aries.horoscope_text: Today there might be tension in the air with no discernible cause, Aries. Family members could seem preoccupied with problems they can't quite define. Your natural inclination might be to try to cheer them up, but it probably won't work. Don't be too annoyed if they don't respond to your efforts. It isn't them. It's the planets. This is a great day to jog, do aerobics, or otherwise work off tension.
aries.deploy_today: No — Tension with no discernible cause is your merge conflict waiting to happen.
aries.prophecy: The stars say your efforts will be noticed. Your PR has been open for six days with zero reviews. It's the planets.

taurus.horoscope_text: You could get some mysterious phone calls today, Taurus, like wrong numbers or hang-ups. Other people might seem less communicative than usual, Taurus, and you're likely to be preoccupied with your own thoughts. You might feel a bit more nervous than usual, but that should go away if you take a brisk walk or get some other exercise. If you've been thinking about doing some writing, this is the day to start.
taurus.deploy_today: No — The mysterious hang-ups are your CI pipeline trying to warn you. Listen to them.
taurus.prophecy: The stars say today is great for writing. Your ticket has no description. The acceptance criteria field says 'TBD.' It has said that since April.

gemini.horoscope_text: Confusion over money matters might come up for you today, Gemini. You may need to check your records in order to shed light on some past transactions. Don't panic. All should be well. You just need to ascertain the facts. You might have some rather intense dreams tonight. Write them down. You'll want to remember them later, as they could reveal a lot about your current situation. They might also inspire future projects.
gemini.deploy_today: No — You can't reconcile your finances today. Do not also reconcile your production database.
gemini.prophecy: The stars say don't panic, check your records. You open git log. You immediately panic.

cancer.horoscope_text: Someone close to you might seem more preoccupied than usual, Cancer, and perhaps a bit difficult to deal with. Don't take this personally. It has little if anything to do with you. He or she doesn't want to share their troubles. You might be feeling a bit tense and jumpy, but this is nothing to worry about. Take a brisk walk or work out. This should bring some relief.
cancer.deploy_today: No — You're already jumpy. One Slack notification during a prod deploy and it's over.
cancer.prophecy: The stars say don't take it personally. Your manager's calendar invite has no title and no agenda. Take it personally.

leo.horoscope_text: Today you might be feeling a bit tense, Leo, and you probably won't understand why. The secret? It's the planets. You might tend to jump at unexpected noises or take offense where none is intended. Relations with others could be a little strained, necessitating some communication about how you're feeling. Try to work off the tension by taking a brisk walk or perhaps working out at the gym.
leo.deploy_today: No — You're already taking offense at unexpected noises. A failed health check will finish you off.
leo.prophecy: The stars say it's the planets, not you. Your code reviewer left 14 comments. It was not the planets.

virgo.horoscope_text: You probably aren't going to feel much like socializing today, Virgo, though friends might contact you. Your patience has worn a bit thin and you could get annoyed at incidents that normally wouldn't bother you. Therefore, this isn't a good day for group communication. It might be best to have a good workout and then rest. You'll probably feel much better after you're done.
virgo.deploy_today: No — Your patience is at zero. One failed pipeline step and this becomes an HR situation.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say rest and you'll feel better. You have a retro, a planning session, and a 'quick sync' that will somehow take 40 minutes. 🫠

libra.horoscope_text: Uptight is the word for today, Libra. At some point you might find yourself the center of attention. While you normally might not mind, now it could make you a bit nervous. When you find everyone looking at you and expecting you to say something, say it, keep it short, and then withdraw. You aren't in the mood. Read about subjects that interest you or explore a topic you enjoy to relieve the stress.
libra.deploy_today: No — 'Say something short and withdraw' is not a deployment strategy.
libra.prophecy: The stars say speak up, keep it short, then withdraw. Someone will ask for elaboration. There is always a follow-up question. 😵‍💫

scorpio.horoscope_text: You're likely to want to be left alone with your own thoughts today. Relaxing with a good book might be at the top of your agenda, Scorpio, and you aren't liable to want to be interrupted. Noise and requests that don't usually bother you might tick you off, so it's best to try to spend some time alone. Also try to be your usual considerate self. To release tension, take a walk.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — You don't want to be interrupted. A deployment will page you approximately 14 times before lunch.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say enjoy some peace and quiet. Slack has 14 unread messages. Three say 'quick question.' None of them are quick.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: Worries over money could have you edgier than usual, Sagittarius. While you may be doing well, you still could be insecure and think your funds might not stretch far enough. Try to consider the situation objectively. You'll probably be relieved by what you find. Others' demands on your time might irritate you more than usual. The best way to escape this kind of tension is to go for a workout or walk.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars say you'll be relieved by what you find. Your AWS bill will ensure that relief is brief.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars say look at the numbers objectively. You will open the AWS cost explorer. You will close it immediately. 😰

capricorn.horoscope_text: You probably crave solitude, Capricorn. Even though you may have committed to doing something for a friend or relative, now you find the idea irritating. You could have some tasks of your own that you'd rather work on, or you might simply want to go for a workout and burn off some tension. The latter idea is a good one. Perhaps if you exercise early, you'll feel more like fulfilling your obligations.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — You're already avoiding your commitments. A deployment is just another obligation to resent.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars say fulfill your obligations after some exercise. Your sprint ticket was scoped for 2 points. It is now day 9. 🙃

aquarius.horoscope_text: Although you're normally a sociable person who feels most comfortable in the company of others, Aquarius, today you might rather be alone. You could feel a little under the weather or be stressed from job-related worries. You probably need some rest, but you also could benefit from taking a brisk walk. That will work off some tension, get the endorphins going, and have you feeling yourself again.
aquarius.deploy_today: No — Under the weather with job-related stress is how most P0 incidents start.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say you need rest. Your on-call rotation does not know this. Your on-call rotation has never cared.

pisces.horoscope_text: You tend to enjoy solitude, Pisces, and today you might feel more reclusive than usual. You could be invited to spend time with friends but not feel like accepting. You might even feel a little irritated by them. This is a great day to go for a workout or throw yourself into projects of your own. Physical activity will get rid of stress and help your concentration. Go to it.
pisces.deploy_today: Yes — You're focused, reclusive, and in the zone. This is as good as it gets.
pisces.prophecy: The stars say throw yourself into your own projects. You will reorganize 3 files, rename a variable, and feel deeply accomplished. 🧘
